data.chapter_title_en: What to say upon hearing the Athan (call to prayer)
data.arabic_text: ((يَدْعُو لِنَفسِهِ بَيْنَ الْأَذَانِ وَالْإِقَامَةِ فَإِنَّ الدُّعَاءَ حِينَئِذٍ لاَ يُرَدُّ)).
data.english_text: One should also supplicate for himself during the time between the athan and the iqamah as supplication at such time is not rejected.
